stories: Oil shock re-enters the chat: Brent spikes ~10% to ~$101.6 (WTI ~$96) on Hormuz disruption fears
U.S. trade escalation risk: USTR launches probe that could broaden tariffs across major economies by summer
U.S. tape: stocks slide as CPI gives some relief, but oil dominates inflation/risk pricing
Europe energy-security tail: Gazprom alleges Ukrainian drone attacks linked to TurkStream/Blue Stream facilities
Software cost reset: Atlassian cuts ~10% (~1,600 roles) in restructuring after AI-driven drawdown
Crypto resilience (with a tell): Bitcoin holds near ~$70K while deep-crash hedges stay notable
Single-name momentum/flow: Serve Robotics ($SERV) sees call volume surge to ~24,054 contracts (+~53% vs avg)
Downside hedging/bearish pressure: Upstart ($UPST) prints ~93,583 puts (+~185% vs average)
Index-moving rumor check: Nvidia “mega-beat + 10-for-1 split + dividend hike” claim circulates (unverified social buzz)
